name: voucherswap-local
description: Local server for VoucherSwap old data login and wallet display

scripts.check:syntax: node --check server.js && node --check ecosystem.config.js && node --check scripts/load-env.js && node --check scripts/health.js && node --check scripts/smoke.js && node --check scripts/backup-core.js && node --check scripts/backup.js && node --check scripts/backup-log.js && node --check scripts/backup-local.js && node --check scripts/backup-runner.js
scripts.verify: npm run check:syntax && npm run health && npm run smoke
